name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"idle", "prepared", "aborted", "committed"}]
    /\ coordinator \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborted", "committed"}
    /\ messages \in [1..N -> {"", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

Init ==
    /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ coordinator = "idle"
    /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> ""]

PrepareMsg ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "Prepare"

VoteYesMsg ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "VoteYes"

VoteNoMsg ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "VoteNo"

CommitMsg ==
    /\ coordinator = "committing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "Commit"

AbortMsg ==
    /\ coordinator = "aborted"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "Abort"

ParticipantPrepare(i) ==
    /\ participants[i] = "idle"
    /\ messages[i] = "Prepare"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "prepared"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>

ParticipantVoteYes(i) ==
    /\ participants[i] = "prepared"
    /\ messages[i] = "VoteYes"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, participants, messages>>

ParticipantVoteNo(i) ==
    /\ participants[i] = "prepared"
    /\ messages[i] = "VoteNo"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>

CoordinatorPrepare ==
    /\ coordinator = "idle"
    /\ coordinator' = "preparing"
    /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Prepare"]
    /\ UNCHANGED participants

CoordinatorCommit ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "prepared"
    /\ coordinator' = "committing"
    /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Commit"]
    /\ UNCHANGED participants

CoordinatorAbort ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \E i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "aborted"
    /\ coordinator' = "aborted"
    /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Abort"]
    /\ UNCHANGED participants

ParticipantCommit(i) ==
    /\ participants[i] = "prepared"
    /\ messages[i] = "Commit"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>

ParticipantAbort(i) ==
    /\ participants[i] = "prepared" \/ participants[i] = "aborted"
    /\ messages[i] = "Abort"
    /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinator, messages>>

Next ==
    \/ CoordinatorPrepare
    \/ CoordinatorCommit
    \/ CoordinatorAbort
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: ParticipantPrepare(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: ParticipantVoteYes(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: ParticipantVoteNo(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: ParticipantCommit(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: ParticipantAbort(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 1..N>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 1..N>>

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[(i % N) + 1] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![(i % N) + 1] = 1]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![(i % N) + 1] = 0]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    \/ UNCHANGED <<forks, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, i, num


(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have number 1 and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 1]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: maximum number currently held *)
maxNum == Max(Seq(num))

(* Process i's action: enter critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, num>>

(* Process i's action: exit critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag, num>>

(* Next-state relation: any process may enter or exit *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N: Enter(i) \/ Exit(i)

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
MutualExclusion == Len({i \in 1..N : flag[i]}) <= 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, num>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
          /\ head \in 0..K
          /\ tail \in 0..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ head' = (head + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 1, Len(q))

Next == IF size < K THEN Producer ELSE Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Majority
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, votedFor


TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N \/ {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor' = self
              /\ state' = "Follower"

VoteGranted == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
              /\ votedFor' = votedFor
              /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ VoteGranted

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in {TRUE, FALSE}

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadStart == /\ readers < N
              /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadEnd == /\ readers > 0
           /\ readers' = readers - 1
           /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteStart == /\ readers = 0
              /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE

WriteEnd == /\ writer_active = TRUE
            /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Next == \E action \in {ReadStart, ReadEnd, WriteStart, WriteEnd} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
VARIABLES chanState, procState


(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of channels (p,q) *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ Proc \subseteq 1..N
    /\ Chan \subseteq Proc \X Proc
    /\ Chan = {c \in Proc \X Proc : c[1] # c[2]}

(* Local state of each process: "idle" or "recorded" *)
State == {"idle", "recorded"}

(* Channel state: sequence of messages in transit *)
ChannelState == Seq("msg")

(* Global state: mapping from processes to local state, and channels to channel state *)
StateSpace == [p \in Proc |-> State] \X [c \in Chan |-> ChannelState]

(* Initial state: all processes idle, all channels empty *)
Init == 
    /\ procState = [p \in Proc |-> "idle"]
    /\ chanState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]

(* Marker message *)
Marker == "marker"

(* Send a marker on channel c after recording state *)
SendMarker(c) == 
    /\ procState[c[1]] = "recorded"
    /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(chanState[c], Marker)]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, chanState>>

(* Receive a marker on channel c *)
ReceiveMarker(c) == 
    /\ procState[c[2]] = "idle"
    /\ chanState[c] = <<Marker>> \/ Marker \in Head(chanState[c])
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![c[2]] = "recorded"]
    /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(chanState[c])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, chanState>>

(* Receive a normal message on channel c *)
ReceiveMsg(c) == 
    /\ procState[c[2]] = "recorded"
    /\ chanState[c] = <<"msg">> \/ "msg" \in Head(chanState[c])
    /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(chanState[c])]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, chanState>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ \E c \in Chan : SendMarker(c)
    \/ \E c \in Chan : ReceiveMarker(c)
    \/ \E c \in Chan : ReceiveMsg(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, chanState>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, msg

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ msg \in {"idle", "sent"}

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ msg = "idle"

Next == \/ /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ msg' = IF token = N THEN "sent" ELSE msg

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, msg>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

KeysVal == 1..Keys
ValuesVal == 1..Values

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [KeysVal -> ValuesVal]

Init == store = [k \in KeysVal |-> 1]

Put(k, v) == store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
Get(k) == /\ UNCHANGED store

Next == \E k \in KeysVal : \E v \in ValuesVal :
          Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(p) == /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
            /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accepted(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].value' = proposers[p].value
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Next == \E p \in 1..M:
          \E a \in 1..N:
            \E b \in 1..N:
              /\ Prepare(p)
              /\ Promise(a, p)
              /\ Accept(p)
              /\ Accepted(a, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES chunks, sent, retransmits, finished

TypeOK ==
    /\ chunks \in Seq(File)
    /\ sent \in SUBSET Seq(File)
    /\ retransmits \in [chunk \in File |-> 0..MAX_RETRIES]
    /\ finished \in BOOLEAN

Init ==
    /\ chunks = File
    /\ sent = <<>>
    /\ retransmits = [c \in File |-> 0]
    /\ finished = FALSE

SendChunk ==
    /\ chunks # <<>>
    /\ chunk = Head(chunks)
    /\ sent' = Append(sent, chunk)
    /\ chunks' = Tail(chunks)
    /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![chunk] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED finished

Retransmit ==
    /\ chunks # <<>>
    /\ chunk = Head(chunks)
    /\ retransmits[chunk] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![chunk] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, chunks, finished>>

Finish ==
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retransmits>>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ Finish

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, retransmits, finished>>

====
